page_metadata.biotools__summary: Web server that facilitates the design of DNA oligonucleotide probes for high-density tiling arrays. The algorithm ensures probe specificity, thermodynamic properties amongst probe sets and target sequence coverage.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Web server that facilitates the design of DNA oligonucleotide probes for high-density tiling arrays. The algorithm ensures probe specificity, thermodynamic properties amongst probe sets and target sequence coverage.
